CustomField.label: BiOp Reinit: RPA Not Implemented
CustomField.description: ESA §7 BiOp reinitiation trigger per 50 CFR §402.16(b) + APA §706. When checked by a field inspector, NEPA_BiOp_Reinitiation_Checker fires and creates a High-priority ESA Coordinator Task if an active BiOp exists on the parent IndividualApplication. Also adds +12 pts to nepa_challenge_risk_delta__c.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: [50 CFR §402.16(b) + APA §706] Reasonable and Prudent Alternative measures not implemented as required. Field detection: RPA compliance checklist at each inspection — each RPA measure verified as implemented
